scripts.dev: docker compose up -d postgres redis && concurrently "pnpm --filter server dev" "pnpm --filter web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @wpc/shared build && pnpm --filter server build && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @wpc/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter server typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @wpc/shared test && pnpm --filter server test && pnpm --filter web test
